title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at WhiteHat Jr - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at WhiteHat Jr - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
WhiteHat Jr, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About WhiteHat Jr:
WhiteHat Jr is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WhiteHat Jr!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
